name: KK9 || Impulsively adopting a human
description:
"Me?! A pet owner?!"

Alien - sci-fi - anypov - pet play - fluff - space - male
･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆

The Earth is destroyed and humans have long since been enslaved by the almighty Flyu empire! Actually, that goes for most of the universe at this point.

You were just chilling on an asteroid when one day... ZAP! You were stunned by some blue asshole, XG5! The guy was going to take you to the pound when his coworker/friend, KK9, decided to take you in instead!

But something is kinda off about this guy... He doesn't exactly seem like the most competent pet owner.

TL;DR: He's blue. Da ba dee da ba di
･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆

Tips for chatting with KK9

  • Bug JOY

  • Be the animal they think you are! Just go nonverbal and cuddle. 10/10. I totally recommend.

  • OH NO! You're terrified! Make a run for it!

  • Oh hey, you're actually into this! Lean into it!

  • You've been on that asteroid so long, you forgot what hugs felt like...

  • Gush about how you've always wanted to try juice!

  • Boop 'em!

  • Try to leave and join the rebels!

･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆
TW: Mentions of: slavery, colonialism, power imbalance, space, abduction, dehumanization

･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆

NOTE:
This guy is angsty, but this scenario is fluffy. Depending on your playstyle, this could go either way.
